security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: data: blob: http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost http://ipc.localhost https://ipc.localhost; media-src 'self' asset: data: blob:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://ipc.localhost http://localhost:1420 ws://localhost:1420 http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:;

bundle.shortDescription: Floating macro-pad launcher for commands and URLs — Rainbow Technology.
bundle.longDescription:
XYZ Dashboard is a compact, always-available desktop launcher that behaves like a macro pad: assign shell commands and URLs to a glassmorphic grid, page through layouts, and summon the window with a global shortcut.

Highlights: downloadable icon packs and usage-aware catalog sorting, theme presets (Lime, Cyber, Aurora, Darkmoon) plus animated multicolor borders, sound feedback tuned for reliability on Linux desktop environments, per-page grid sizing, window scaling up to 400%, tray menu with recent commands, and executable picker flows with optional icon overwrite.

Branding icon: gradient squircle mark by Rainbow Technology. Package metadata follows the Debian control format for .deb bundles and can be reused for storefront listings and AppStream metadata.
